scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ssml-utilities/accent-ir build && pnpm --filter @ssml-utilities/analyze-contract build && pnpm --filter @ssml-utilities/analyze-backend build
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @ssml-utilities/accent-ir type-check && pnpm --filter @ssml-utilities/analyze-contract type-check && pnpm --filter @ssml-utilities/analyze-backend type-check
scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @ssml-utilities/accent-ir clean && pnpm --filter @ssml-utilities/analyze-contract clean && pnpm --filter @ssml-utilities/analyze-backend clean
